content: By integrating the ICM curiosity mechanism into a triple hybrid retrieval RAG system, we can build an autonomous knowledge exploration agent that intrinsically rewards itself for retrieving under-sampled combinations of dense, sparse, and full-text information to fill gaps in the LLM's existing knowledge base. This system would move beyond static single-query retrieval to proactively discover novel, unconnected knowledge that the LLM would not encounter in standard task-driven RAG.
